title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Who We Are?
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Who We Are?

Istanbul Esenyurt University Language Teaching Application and Research Center was established in 2019 and carries out educational programs, examinations, and supporting activities in line with its mission and vision.

As a rapidly growing language center within our university, which was founded by the Yeşilköy 2001 Education, Culture, and Health Foundation, we offer courses to those who wish to learn Turkish.

Our center not only teaches Turkish, but also promotes Turkish culture and intercultural interaction.

With an experienced language teaching staff, our center contributes to the international dissemination of the Turkish language. At Istanbul Esenyurt University Language Teaching Application and Research Center, the "Common European Framework of Reference for Languages" (CEFR) is used as the basis for our teaching.

Our exams assess the four basic skills—reading, writing, listening, and speaking—in accordance with the CEFR standards. These exams measure Turkish language proficiency, and successful results are certified with official documents.

This content was updated on 02/09/2025.
